narrative:
Perry / Pike (precinct in Coshocton County) has 861 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.3 percentage points.
